title: Providers
empty: No providers yet — create one to start routing traffic.

form.channelWarning: Changing the channel of an existing provider can break its credentials.
form.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use the channel's built-in default.

tls.title: TLS fingerprint
tls.jsonHint: Pick a preset to fill, or edit the JSON for a custom fingerprint

delete.providerConfirm: This deletes provider "{{name}}" together with its credential pool's availability. Routes referencing it will fail over or error.
delete.credentialConfirm: This permanently deletes credential "{{name}}". The upstream account is not affected.

creds.secretKept: Leave empty to keep the stored secret.

bulk.title: Bulk import credentials
bulk.textareaHint: One key per line. Optional: key,label or key<TAB>label. Lines starting with # are ignored.

secret.saInvalid: Must be JSON containing client_email and private_key
secret.tokensHint: Paste tokens exported from the official client. expires_at_ms is unix milliseconds.
secret.geminiHint: project_id is required for this channel (the OAuth wizard resolves it automatically).

wizard.title: Connect {{channel}}
wizard.pasteHint: Approve in the browser, then copy the URL you were redirected to (it carries code and state).
wizard.pasteInvalid: Not a callback URL — it must contain code and state, and must not be the authorization URL itself.
wizard.kiroStartUrlHint: Required for Enterprise; BuilderId/Internal have built-in defaults.
wizard.cookieHint: Paste the full Cookie header or just sessionKey=…; only sessionKey is used.
wizard.cookieInvalid: No sessionKey found in the pasted text.

usage.title: Upstream usage
usage.sparingly: Queries the upstream account live — some upstreams rate-limit this; use sparingly.
usage.unsupported: This channel exposes no usage endpoint.

models.title: Models
models.empty: No models registered. Aggregated /v1/models lists alias/route names; per-provider model rows feed routing and pricing.
models.modelIdHint: Upstream model id, or an arbitrary id you expose (need not exist upstream).
models.pricingHint: Leave blank for free / token-only. Decimal values.
models.variantsHint: Suffixes expand one model into many (e.g. -thinking, -32k). One per line.
models.deleteConfirm: Delete model "{{name}}" and all its variants?
